title: Derive Release 122 from qualified Release 121
description: Stage the complete verified Release 121 source and permit only the reviewed five-path absurd-alternate delta.
close_reason: Release 122 stages Release 121 first, inventories both trees, and rejects any changed path outside 1dungeon, absurd_alternates, expansions, gsyntax, and zork1.

title: Add one-use troll deception
description: Allow a ridiculous but plausible trick to create one immediate tactical opening without permanently disabling the troll.
close_reason: TRICK TROLL works once, suppresses the immediate response, and creates only the brief opportunity needed for prepared restraint.

title: Add living troll restraint with the real rope
description: Require the carried rope and genuine troll vulnerability, then bind him alive, drop the axe, and open the passages.
close_reason: Alert restraint fails; immediate post-trick restraint consumes the real rope into the restraint, drops the real axe, keeps the troll alive, and opens east and west through TROLL-FLAG.

title: Restore troll danger when restraint is missed or removed
description: Ensure leaving wastes the trick opportunity and UNTIE returns both the rope and the troll's threat.
close_reason: Returning after abandoning the trick produces live troll attacks and alert rope failure; UNTIE restores the rope and canonical passage danger.

title: Prepare the brown sack as an egg catcher
description: Let the real sack be spread beneath the tree as an open searchable catcher instead of inventing a new safety object.
close_reason: PUT SACK UNDER TREE positions the real brown sack at the Forest Path and opens it so a caught egg remains accessible.

title: Burn the nest with the ivory torch
description: Require the real held flaming torch, the nest still in the tree, and the player beside it before applying the special falling-egg outcome.
close_reason: The special fire route is limited to BURN NEST WITH TORCH in Up a Tree; every other burning context delegates to canonical behavior.

title: Preserve the egg with preparation
description: Catch the real jewel-encrusted egg in the prepared real sack without duplicating treasure or leaving stale nest prose.
close_reason: The prepared route moves the existing intact egg into the real sack, keeps it accessible, consumes the nest, and replaces its stale nest-specific fixed description.

title: Use canonical egg destruction without preparation
description: Make the unprepared fall invoke the existing BAD-EGG consequences rather than creating parallel broken treasure.
close_reason: The unprepared fall invokes BAD-EGG and produces the existing broken egg, broken canary, and canonical reduced values; ordinary candle burning remains V-BURN.

title: Qualify production and test-only outcome routes
description: Prove the real-map troll journey and both nest branches while excluding all setup verbs from production.
close_reason: Production troll, prepared catcher, canonical breakage, canonical non-torch burning, corrected egg prose, and restored troll hostility routes all pass under dfrotz; production contains no setup module.

title: Lock and publish Absurd Alternate Release 122
description: Commit the artifact identity, fail-closed workflow, qualification documentation, completed beadtrain, and future parity boundary.
close_reason: Release 122 is locked at 107880 bytes, checksum 0xf13d, and SHA-256 98320cd2c11a963b3f23c9a36782f31887279798c26958942ef48ba6ff939a28; Wizard ideas remain Zork II scope.
